name: integrate-jupiter
description: Jupiter integration and documentation skills for Solana, crypto, and finance workflows

interface.shortDescription: Jupiter crypto and finance docs for Solana
interface.longDescription: Expert coding skills and documentation for integrating Jupiter swap, lend, perps, trigger, tokens, and price APIs on Solana. Covers endpoint selection, finance and crypto workflows, error handling, and production hardening.
defaultPrompt: How do I integrate Jupiter Swap API v2 in my app?
How do I integrate Jupiter Lend earn or borrow flows in my app?
Help me integrate Jupiter APIs on Solana.
Help me migrate from Jupiter Metis to Swap API v2.
